feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Datasphere Internal error: SQL View - Resource governor for 'cursors' exceeded
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have define an SQL View which uses a few local table variables to split up the logic and returns a union of these temporary tables.

Whenever I attempt to preview the result, I run into the following error:

internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database <DWC_BWBRIDGESPACE.BWBRIDGE> [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB SO][HDBODBC] General error;403 internal error: An error occurred while opening the cursor for the remote database. The server name: "DWCHDL2" [SAP][ODBC Driver][SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Relational Engine]Resource governor for 'cursors' exceededThe problematic query: "SELECT

If return each of table variables on their own, the error doesn't appear and I can preview the data just fine.How can I debug this further? Is there a parameter I can check to see where the issue may be coming from?

entry.title: Datasphere: Table Function - Union with Tuple instead of a Table
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm creating a SQL-based View in Datasphere. I have a requirement to create multiple versions from the same record I'm looping over. I have inititalized a table variable to hold my result and have created a cursor over my source table. Based on each iteration, I manually create the tuple that I would like to insert as my new record. The issue that I'm facing is appending to my result table. I want to overwrite my result table as the union of itself with the new record, but the syntax check fails as a "from" clause is expected implying that I have to use a table. I know that what I'm trying to achieve is possible on other DBs and SQL flavors but cannot seem to find the equivalent on HANA. Any ideas? I have attached a screenshot of the code snippet.

Thanks!

entry.title: 在维护“设置支付事务的银行确定”时，银行子账户不能维护，保存后为空
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance##在维护“设置支付事务的银行确定”时，银行子账户不能维护，保存后为空

entry.title: SAP CAP Node.js - Insert vector embedding data into hana cloud is not working
entry.content:
Hello, everyone,

I referred these two links cap-ai-vector-engine-sample ,cap-llm-plugin-samples  to develop a CAP RAG application.

When I insert the embedding data into the db, I got an error message "argument type mismatch: Result is not a single value".

After my research, I found that if the dependency @SAP/cds-hana is added, data can be inserted into the database successfully, However, my App use Fiori elements and enbaled draft function, if the @SAP/cds-hana dependency is used, my Fiori app will encounter an error: SqlError: invalid column name: DRAFTADMINISTRATIVEDATA.INPROCESSBYUSER. When this dependency is removed, the Fiori app will not report an error, but I won't be able to insert data into the db. It seems that this is a dilemma, So, is there a conflict between @SAP/cds-hana and the draft-enabled function?  And is there any way to insert data into the db normally without using this dependency?

Any advice or suggestions would be appreciated.

schema.cds

entity DocumentChunk : cuid, managed {
    file            : Association to Files;
    text_chunk      : LargeString;
    metadata_column : LargeString;
    embedding       : Vector(1536);
}

service.js ( insert into db )

const embeddingResult = await capllmplugin.getEmbeddingWithConfig(
          embeddingModelConfig,
          chunk.pageContent
        );

embedding = embeddingResult?.data[0]?.embedding;

const entry = {
          file_ID: uuid,
          text_chunk: chunk.pageContent,
          metadata_column: fileName,
          embedding: array2VectorBuffer(embedding),
        };
textChunkEntries.push(entry);

// Insert the text chunk with embeddings into db
      const insertStatus = await INSERT.into(DocumentChunk).entries(
        textChunkEntries
      );

package.json

 "dependencies": {
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "3.25.0",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "3.25.0",
    "@sap/cds": "^8",
    "@cap-js/hana": "^1",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4",
    "cap-llm-plugin": "^1.4.4",
    "express": "^4",
    "langchain": "^0.1.19",
  }

entry.title: HANA Cloud - cannot change Update Mode
entry.content: I am currently running two versions of HANA Cloud QRC3/2024 and QRC4/2024.  I would like to change the default Update Mode of the instance to "Apply changes without a restart".  I can view the current default mode in SAP HANA Cloud Central's Overview -> Configuration page "Apply changes with a restart".  However when I click on Manage Configuration (upper right section of page), the "General" or any other page that appears does not have the Update Mode section to change.  From a security perspective, I have SAP HANA Cloud Administrator, SAP HAAN Cloud Security Adminstrator and Subaccount Administrator role collections.   I created the HANA Cloud instance so I would think I would be able to change the Update Mode.   I would appreciate any assistance that can be provided.

entry.title: Uploading Data to S/4HANA On-Premise from BTP HANA Cloud DB Using SDI Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a urgent requirement to upload or insert a large volume of data into a S/4HANA On-Premise system from BTP HANA Cloud DB using SDI Integration.

Could anyone confirm if this is a feasible approach? Is it possible to upload data directly into the S/4HANA On-Premise system?

I connected the S/4HANA system using the ABAPAdapter, accessed all the tables, and created Virtual Tables. However, I encountered an issue when trying to insert data into the Virtual Tables

Can anyone guide me on the correct approach to achieve this? Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Note: We need to do this by using SDI only

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: What are the limitations to the number of columns a vertex/edge table can have for sap hana graph ?
entry.content:
Is there any limitation as to what number of columns can be added in a table in sap hana db . I intend to use the table to create a graph workspace. Since sap hana mainly uses homogenous graphs with single label , hence I plan to add all my columns in a single table. 

Hence is there any upper limit as to what number of columns will sap hana support ?

Kindly advice.

entry.title: how to get print on date in a purchase order in sap s4 hana cloud
entry.content: The requirement is to have the purchase order printing date in SAP hana cloud

entry.title: Extraction is taking time in GR55 while downloading transactional details
entry.content:
Hello All,

I require to download transaction details for each internal income statement in GR55 for Report Group ZG12.

I have created VBA Script for SAP GUI automation and is working. but, it is consuming more time, nearly 1 or 2 hour depends on data.

So, is there any way to get the data in short time ?

entry.title: C_HAMOD example question
entry.content:
Hi, in the Exam sample questions for C_HAMOD this question is contained with the stated answer:

I dont't see why "only USA" is correct. When we query the sales CV, then the income view and its priviliges shouldn't matter at all. In my opinion, "Europe and USA" should be correct.

Can anybody explain why "only USA" is correct?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: SAP DMS and Destination Help for CAP service.
entry.content:
Scenario: We have 2 sub-account, sub-account A and sub-account B in SAP BTP Cockpit under a global account, all the development is being done on SAP BAS.

Sub-account A: This account has a DMS service which is currently being consumed by an app.
Sub-account B: This account is our development account in which we do our development.

Problem: The DMS service needs to be called to Sub-account B from Sub-account A for making an attachment functionality in our application. To consume the DMS, I need to create a CAP service which has the functionality of List all the content of the repository of the DMS, Upload content into the repo and download content from the repo.

Currently, I have attempted Destination Config and hardcoding the credentials for Bearer token authorization but I am getting 401 unauthorized error when trying to call the DMS service using destination and Method not allowed error when trying to use hard-code the credentials (which i know is not a recommended practice but I had to test it) but both these efforts have been in vain. 

Can somebody share their expertise on this topic, If its even possible to do something like this: Creating a CAP service which can download,upload and List the content of a DMS repository which is situated in a different Sub-account under the same global account. 
Kindly Help if you can. Thank you

entry.title: How to handle variables in SQL based view - Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hi Guys,SAP HANA cloud

Need your expertise in handling the variables in SQL based view. I want to read the values of specific record's fields from the prior record into variables and then want to search a record based on those variables.

Tried using below script but not assigning any values into LINK_LEVEL, FATH_COMP, FATH_GPC, SON_COMP, SON_GPC.

 

DECLARE LV_REC_COUNT INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_INDEX INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_NEST_INDEX INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_INDEX_TEST INTEGER;

DECLARE LV_FATH_COMP NVARCHAR(8);
DECLARE LV_SON_COMP NVARCHAR(8);
DECLARE LV_FATH_GPC NVARCHAR(18);
DECLARE LV_SON_GPC NVARCHAR(18);

-- DECLARE LT_TEMP TABLE ( CONS_SET VARCHAR(2), SU_BUNIT VARCHAR(2) );

LT_COST_03_DATA = SELECT * FROM "APMR_ST_COST_03";
SELECT COUNT(*) INTO LV_REC_COUNT FROM :LT_COST_03_DATA;

LT_COST_INDEX = SELECT *, ' ' AS LINK_LEVEL, ' ' AS FATH_COMP, ' ' AS FATH_GPC, ' ' AS SON_COMP, ' ' AS SON_GPC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TOLL_FLAG ORDER BY FRS_CODE, CALMONTH, NFRD_GPNO ) AS ROWNUM FROM :LT_COST_03_DATA;

LT_COST_LINK_FINAL = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE 1 = 100;

LV_INDEX = 1;
LV_NEST_INDEX = 1;

WHILE (LV_INDEX <= 2 )
DO
LV_INDEX = LV_INDEX + 1;
LT_INDEX_RECORD = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
IF RECORD_COUNT(:LT_INDEX_RECORD) <> 0 THEN
WHILE (LV_NEST_INDEX <= 20) DO
IF LV_NEST_INDEX = 1 THEN
SELECT "FRS_CODE" INTO LV_FATH_COMP FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "FRS_FPUR" INTO LV_SON_COMP FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
LT_COST_LINK_FINAL =
SELECT * FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD
UNION
SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;
ELSE
LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE
"FRS_CODE" = LV_SON_COMP AND
"NFRD_GPNO" = LV_SON_GPC;
IF RECORD_COUNT(:LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD) <> 0 THEN
SELECT "FRS_CODE" INTO LV_FATH_COMP FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD WHERE "FRS_CODE" = LV_SON_COMP AND
"NFRD_GPNO" = LV_SON_GPC;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT "FRS_FPUR" INTO LV_SON_COMP FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;

SELECT REPLACE( "LINK_LEVEL", '' , LV_NEST_INDEX ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_COMP", '' , LV_FATH_COMP ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_GPC", '' , LV_FATH_GPC ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "SON_COMP", '' , LV_SON_COMP ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_GPC", '' , LV_FATH_GPC ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;

LT_COST_LINK_FINAL =
SELECT * FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD
UNION
SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;
END IF;
END IF;
LV_NEST_INDEX = LV_NEST_INDEX + 1;
END WHILE;
LV_NEST_INDEX = 1;
ELSE
END IF;
END WHILE;

RETURN :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;

-----------------------------

Can some one let me know how to get the values of specific fields of specific record into variables or so.

Appreciate your help, thanks.

Regards,

Santosh T.

entry.title: What are the cases where homogenous graph and heterogenous graph should be used ?
entry.content:
Hi , In what cases do we use homogenous graphs and heterogenous graphs in SAP HANA DB.

Is there a performance difference in using homogenous and heterogenous graphs .

Any sample use cases for homogenous and heterogenous graphs would be very helpful.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Business Accelerator Hub API's try out Sandbox Environment
entry.content: I am using equipment API try out option on sap business accelerator hub and in try out option sandbox environment is used so I just want to know whether API hosted on on-premise or they are completely on cloud.

entry.title: Importing FSV to Cutomizing environment
entry.content:
On SAP S4C , I need to create an FSV identical to one from another project. Is there a way to copy or import it into the new system (Cutomizing environment) without having to recreate it manually via an external file?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: 在启用高级评估之后，计提坏账准备时，需要勾选客户主数据中的信用参数文件的风险类，导致必须启用信用额度；不勾选风险类，进行基于信用风险的减值计提时，不能计提；
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance#在启用高级评估之后，计提坏账准备时（即基于信用风险的减值），就必须需要勾选客户主数据中的信用参数文件的风险类，导致必须启用信用额度，否则销售订单时，显示信用额度关闭；不勾选风险类，进行基于信用风险的减值计提时，不能计提；实际业务中，未启用信用额度，但是要进行坏账计提，如何处理这种冲突业务？

entry.title: SFTP
entry.content: hello

entry.title: SAC - Live Data Model- Content Network Storage transport
entry.content:
Hi SAC experts,

I have a HANA Cloud Live Data Model in my dev tenant and need to transport to the other tenants keeping the model format settings.

When I transport via Content Network Storage some model information's are lost, like (SAC Model - Dimensions image):

  • Dimension descriptions added at SAC Model level
  • Hidden Dimensions at SAC Model level

 

 

But for the measures I still can see the same hidden configurations (SAC Model - Measures image).

 

For, the import options I select "Overwrite objects and data".

Do you know if is SAC limitation or am I doing this wrongly?

Thank you in advance,

Rui

entry.title: Unable to create multiple WBS elements in a single S/4 Hana API API_ENTERPRISE_PR call using Postman
entry.content:
I am able to create a single WBS element for an enterprise project through the S/4 Hana public cloud API call by passing the request Json through Postman as below.


But I am unable to create 2 WBS elements in a single S/4 Hana API call using Postman by passing the below json request as in the image below

Error response is as below

Please suggest how I can mitigate this issue.

entry.title: Knowledge Graph and GraphRAG: Implementation with SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub) and Future Perspec
entry.content:
Greetings,

We are currently exploring the implementation of GraphRAG using HANA Cloud / Datasphere Knowledge Graph. We are looking to leverage SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub) for this purpose and are in the process of gathering information on the specific implementation methods. However, we are currently facing a lack of detailed information and would greatly appreciate your expertise and insights.

Specifically, we would be grateful if you could provide guidance on the following points:

Specific Implementation Methods for GraphRAG using SAP AI Core (Generative AI Hub):

To realize GraphRAG, which functionalities of SAP AI Core should we utilize, and how can we effectively integrate them with HANA Cloud (Datasphere) Knowledge Graph?
Could you provide detailed information such as concrete architecture examples, implementation steps, and considerations?
For instance, what components (models, pipelines, etc.)
should be built within AI Core, and how can we optimally orchestrate query execution against the Knowledge Graph, vector search, and response generation?

Comparison of Architecture with Microsoft's GraphRAG:

As a general concept for GraphRAG, there is an architecture proposed by Microsoft, as referenced here: https://microsoft.github.io/graphrag/
(Considering aspects such as Community Report generation, Global Search, and Local Search).
Is the GraphRAG architecture within the SAP environment similar to Microsoft's architecture?
If there are differences, could you please elaborate on SAP's unique architecture or the optimized GraphRAG approach for the SAP environment?
In particular, we are interested in understanding the unique advantages and characteristics of SAP's GraphRAG when leveraging Knowledge Graphs.

We look forward to receiving your valuable information and opinions.
Thank you in advance for your assistance.
